{{Infobox character
| name = Telappen Vashei
| aliases = President Vashei
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|President Vashei was the President of the [[Galactic Union]] a little over a hundred years ago.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Telappen Vashei]] was President of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Telappen Vashei]] was a stern but kind human woman.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c41">''The Pilot'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Telappen Vashei]] had iron-gray hair.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c41" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
